g.text: Type to filter using fuzzy search matching on name, kind, namespace, or
Press Enter to view the full resource tree showing the composition
Enter View Resource Tree Ctrl+R Refresh
Shift+→ Toggle Detail Panel Ctrl+W Watch
Shift+← Toggle Detail Panel Ctrl+C Copy Row
Ctrl+K Filter by Kind F1 Help
Ctrl+N Filter by Namespace F12 Capture SVG to clipboard
Ctrl+A Show All Ctrl+Q Exit (press twice)
Press F1 or Escape to close
F1: Help ^Q: Exit (2x) ^C: Copy │ [Ctrl-K: Kind] [Ctrl-N: Namespace] [Ctrl-U: Unhealthy]
